inputs.label: Bottleneck Utilization (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current utilization rate of the primary bottleneck resource, measured over a representative period (e.g., last 4 weeks).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil darboğaz kaynağının temsili bir dönem (örneğin son 4 hafta) üzerinden ölçülen mevcut kullanım oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Auslastungsrate der primären Engpassressource, gemessen über einen repräsentativen Zeitraum (z. B. letzte 4 Wochen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'utilisation actuel de la ressource principale du goulot d'étranglement, mesuré sur une période représentative (par exemple, les 4 dernières semaines).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de utilización actual del recurso cuello de botella principal, medida durante un período representativo (ej. últimas 4 semanas).

inputs.label: Average Demand Rate (units/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average customer demand rate for the product family flowing through the bottleneck.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğazdan geçen ürün ailesi için ortalama müşteri talep oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kundennachfragerate für die Produktfamilie, die den Engpass durchläuft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de demande client moyen pour la famille de produits passant par le goulot d'étranglement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de demanda promedio del cliente para la familia de productos que pasa por el cuello de botella.

inputs.label: Bottleneck Capacity (units/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum theoretical output rate of the bottleneck resource under ideal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğaz kaynağının ideal koşullar altında maksimum teorik çıktı oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale theoretische Ausbringungsrate der Engpassressource unter idealen Bedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de sortie théorique maximal de la ressource du goulot d'étranglement dans des conditions idéales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de producción teórica máxima del recurso cuello de botella en condiciones ideales.

inputs.label: Proposed Investment Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total capital expenditure required for the bottleneck improvement (e.g., new equipment, tooling, automation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğaz iyileştirmesi için gereken toplam sermaye harcaması (örneğin yeni ekipman, takım, otomasyon).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Kapitalausgaben für die Engpassverbesserung (z. B. neue Ausrüstung, Werkzeuge, Automatisierung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses d'investissement totales nécessaires pour l'amélioration du goulot d'étranglement (par exemple, nouvel équipement, outillage, automatisation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto de capital total requerido para la mejora del cuello de botella (ej. nuevo equipo, herramientas, automatización).

inputs.label: Expected Capacity Increase (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage increase in bottleneck capacity after the investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım sonrası darboğaz kapasitesinde beklenen yüzde artış.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete prozentuale Steigerung der Engpasskapazität nach der Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'augmentation attendu de la capacité du goulot d'étranglement après l'investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de aumento esperado en la capacidad del cuello de botella después de la inversión.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned operating hours of the bottleneck resource per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğaz kaynağının yıllık toplam planlanan çalışma saati.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de fonctionnement prévues de la ressource du goulot d'étranglement par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de horas de operación planificadas del recurso cuello de botella por año.

inputs.label: Profit Margin per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contribution margin (revenue minus variable cost) per unit of product flowing through the bottleneck.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğazdan geçen ürünün birim başına katkı marjı (gelir eksi değişken maliyet).
businessContext_i18n.de: Deckungsbeitrag (Umsatz minus variable Kosten) pro Einheit des Produkts, das den Engpass durchläuft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge sur coût variable (revenu moins coût variable) par unité de produit passant par le goulot d'étranglement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de contribución (ingresos menos costo variable) por unidad de producto que pasa por el cuello de botella.

inputs.label: Quality Yield at Bottleneck (%)
inputs.businessContext: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.

label_i18n.es: Rendimiento de calidad en el cuello de botella (%)

businessContext_i18n.en: First-pass yield (percentage of good units) at the bottleneck operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğaz operasyonunda ilk geçiş verimi (iyi birimlerin yüzdesi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erstausbeute (Prozentsatz der guten Einheiten) am Engpassvorgang.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de premier passage (pourcentage de bonnes unités) à l'opération du goulot d'étranglement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento de primer paso (porcentaje de unidades buenas) en la operación del cuello de botella.

rules.message: Demand rate exceeds current bottleneck capacity; investment is critical.
Investment cost must be greater than zero.
Expected capacity increase cannot be negative.
Quality yield below 50% indicates severe quality issues; consider root cause analysis before investment.

thresholds.message: Negative ROI – investment is not financially justified.
Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider alternative investments.
Bottleneck utilization below 70% – consider if this is the true bottleneck.
Negative capacity gap – demand already exceeds capacity; investment is urgent.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
